description_for_human: Calculate exact take-home pay after federal + state income taxes for any US salary across all 50 states. Uses real 2026 IRS tax brackets.
description_for_model: Use this tool to compute US after-tax take-home pay. Given an annual gross salary, a US state slug (e.g. 'texas', 'new-york', 'california'), and an optional filing status ('single', 'married', 'hoh'), returns annual/monthly/biweekly/weekly/hourly take-home, federal income tax, state income tax, FICA (Social Security + Medicare), total taxes, and effective tax rate. All 50 states supported. 2026 IRS brackets. Free, no auth required. Call /api/calculate?states=1 first if you need to discover valid state slugs.
